title: Bitcoin's high conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows

content: English football appears to be riding high following Arsenal's Premier League win. But scratch beneath the surface and all is not as good as it looks.

zh.title: 英国交易所通讯：英超足球——独树一帜？
zh.summary: 阿森纳的英超联赛胜利似乎提升了英国足球的地位，但潜在问题表明竞争格局不如新闻头条所示的那样有利。这项分析引发了人们对该运动真实健康状况的疑问。

title: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
summary: The UK Competition and Markets Authority has enabled publishers to opt out of Google AI search results. The measure aims to strengthen publishers' negotiating positions when licensing content to Google.
content: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".

zh.title: 英国出版商可以选择退出谷歌AI搜索结果
zh.summary: 英国竞争和市场管理局已允许出版商选择退出谷歌AI搜索结果。该措施旨在加强出版商在向谷歌授权内容时的谈判地位。

title: Bitcoin hits lowest since February as crypto competes for liquidity with blockbuster IPOs
summary: Bitcoin has fallen to its lowest level since February as capital flows toward record stock market highs and major IPOs. The decline reflects investors reallocating funds from cryptocurrency to traditional equity markets.
content: Bitcoin continues to decline as stocks hit record highs, with investors also eyeing big IPOs.

zh.title: 比特币跌至二月以来最低水平，加密货币与大型IPO竞争流动性
zh.summary: 随着资本流向创纪录的股市高位和主要IPO，比特币已跌至二月以来的最低水平。这一下降反映了投资者将资金从加密货币重新分配给传统股票市场。

title: Big Tech's AI ambitions pose a major power test for Europe
summary: SoftBank announced plans to build 3.1 GW of AI data centers in northern France by 2031. The project exemplifies Big Tech's massive power requirements as AI infrastructure development accelerates across Europe.
content: Japan's SoftBank on Saturday announced plans to build 3.1 GW of AI data centers in the northern Hauts-de-France region by 2031.

zh.title: 大型科技公司的AI雄心对欧洲构成重大电力考验
zh.summary: 软银宣布计划到2031年在法国北部建设3.1吉瓦的人工智能数据中心。该项目体现了大型科技公司在人工智能基础设施发展加速覆盖欧洲时对电力的巨大需求。

title: 'Without free meal, it's a cup of soup for dinner'
summary: A Boston community cafe saw attendance surge from 60 to over 90 people as it became essential for food-insecure residents. The story illustrates the critical role of community support services in addressing food poverty.
content: Community cafe in Boston says numbers rose from about 60 to more than 90 at the start of the year.

zh.title: "没有免费供餐，晚饭就是一碗汤"
zh.summary: 波士顿一家社区咖啡馆的出席人数从60人激增到90多人，因为它对粮食不安全的居民至关重要。这个故事说明了社区支持服务在解决粮食贫困方面的关键作用。

title: Investors bet humanoid robots will transform industry and homes over the next decade
summary: Fund managers see significant investment opportunities in humanoid robotics over the next decade. The sector is attracting capital amid expectations of transformative applications in industrial and residential settings.
content: “Be ready for it,” said one fund manager who sees enormous opportunities in the space.

zh.title: 投资者押注类人机器人将在未来十年改变工业和家庭
zh.summary: 基金经理看到未来十年人形机器人领域的重大投资机会。该行业在工业和住宅应用的变革性预期推动下正吸引大量资本。

title: Australia's first-quarter economic growth misses estimates on severe weather, weak demand
summary: Australia's first-quarter GDP grew 2.5% year-over-year, missing economist expectations of 2.6%. Severe weather and weak domestic demand weighed on economic performance.
content: The country's GDP expanded 2.5% in the first three months this year, compared to a year earlier, missing economists' expectations for a 2.6% growth.

zh.title: 澳大利亚第一季度经济增长因恶劣天气和需求疲弱而低于预期
zh.summary: 澳大利亚第一季度国内生产总值同比增长2.5%，低于经济学家预期的2.6%。恶劣天气和国内需求疲弱拖累了经济表现。

title: Taking care of your family shouldn’t wreck your retirement
summary: Unpaid family caregiving costs Americans approximately $1,000 per month in lost income and retirement savings. Congress is considering legislation to help caregivers recover financially from their caregiving responsibilities.
content: Unpaid family work is costing caregivers $1,000 a month. Here is how Congress wants to help them catch up.

zh.title: 照顾家人不应该毁掉你的退休生活
zh.summary: 无偿家庭照顾每月给美国人造成约1000美元的收入和退休储蓄损失。国会正在考虑立法以帮助照顾者从照顾责任中经济恢复。

title: Three reasons investors should increase hedging toward the end of summer: Susquehanna
summary: Susquehanna strategists recommend increasing portfolio hedges as summer approaches. The recommendation reflects anticipated market volatility or risk factors in the coming months.

zh.title: 三个理由让投资者应在夏季末增加对冲：Susquehanna
zh.summary: Susquehanna策略师建议在夏季接近时增加投资组合对冲。该建议反映了对即将到来的市场波动或风险因素的预期。

title: Oil climbs as U.S.-Iran trade strikes while Trump says negotiations with Tehran underway
summary: Oil prices rise amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions, with U.S. Central Command reporting the successful interception of Iranian ballistic missiles. The situation is complicated by ongoing negotiations with Tehran, creating uncertainty about future military and economic implications.
content: U.S. Central Command said Tuesday that it had defeated multiple Iranian ballistic missiles following "attempted attacks" by Iran.

zh.title: 随着美国-伊朗贸易紧张局势升级，特朗普表示与德黑兰进行谈判，油价上升
zh.summary: 在美国-伊朗关系升级的背景下，油价上升。美国中央司令部报告成功拦截伊朗弹道导弹。与德黑兰的持续谈判使军事和经济前景面临不确定性。

title: Palo Alto Networks’ earnings show AI is a friend, not a foe, to revenue outlook
summary: Palo Alto Networks' strong earnings demonstrate that AI advancements are driving increased demand for cybersecurity solutions rather than disrupting revenue. The CEO noted that growing AI adoption is heightening the urgency around security needs.
content: The “latest advancements at the AI frontier have increased the level of urgency around cybersecurity,” Palo Alto Networks’ CEO said.

zh.title: Palo Alto Networks的财报显示人工智能对收入前景是朋友而非敌手
zh.summary: Palo Alto Networks强劲的财报表明，人工智能进步正在推动对网络安全解决方案的需求增加，而不是破坏收入。首席执行官指出，日益增长的人工智能采用正在提高安全需求的紧迫性。

title: GameStop wants to buy back $2 billion of its own stock after an eBay-fueled selloff
summary: GameStop announced a $2 billion stock buyback program following recent declines, even as the company reports strong first-quarter performance with a 14% sales increase driven by collectibles. The buyback signals management confidence in the stock's undervaluation.
content: The videogame retailer also said that collectibles helped drive a 14% sales gain in the first quarter.

zh.title: GameStop在eBay推动的抛售后，想要回购20亿美元的自身股票
zh.summary: GameStop宣布了一项20亿美元的股票回购计划，尽管公司报告第一季度业绩强劲，销售额增加14%，由收藏品驱动。回购表明管理层对股票被低估的信心。

title: Japan's Nikkei hits record high as Asia markets rise amid Middle East concerns
summary: Japan's Nikkei index reached record highs as broader Asia-Pacific markets rallied despite geopolitical tensions and concerns about oil prices from the closed Strait of Hormuz. The market strength suggests investor confidence is overcoming short-term regional concerns.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher even amid concerns over volatile oil prices with the Strait of Hormuz remaining closed.

zh.title: 日本日经指数创历史新高，亚洲市场上扬，中东局势令人担忧
zh.summary: 日本日经指数创历史新高，尽管地缘政治紧张局势和霍尔木兹海峡关闭引发的石油价格担忧，亚太地区市场反弹。市场强劲表明投资者信心正在克服短期地区性关切。

title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including ‘Project 2025’ author
summary: Fed Chair Warsh has begun assembling his team at the central bank, including hiring an author who contributed to the conservative "Project 2025" policy blueprint. This signals potential shifts in Fed philosophy and policy direction under new leadership.
content: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."

zh.title: 美联储主席沃什在中央银行进行首次聘用，包括《2025计划》作者
zh.summary: 美联储主席沃什已开始在中央银行组建他的团队，包括聘用为保守派《2025计划》政策蓝图做出贡献的作者。这预示着新领导下美联储理念和政策方向可能出现转变。
